## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Scope

- [ ] Core library behavior
- [ ] Example sketch
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Builder or generated output
- [ ] CI or packaging

## Checks

- [ ] Host tests pass
- [ ] Relevant Arduino examples compile
- [ ] Builder JavaScript checks pass, if touched
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior changed
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes

## Notes

Mention target boards, display libraries, input adapters, or generated profiles tested.
